description: A candidate telemetry bundle exists and has a stable path identity.
Test or production envelope signature and digest bindings mechanically verify.
Operator trust policy is complete enough to be admissible.
Bundle manifest passes structural intake custody checks.
Adapter-shaped telemetry has normalized canonical fields.
Production telemetry ingestion accepts the row as eligible evidence.
Security, provenance, retention, and verifier gates allow credit accounting.
DC-001/DC-002 threshold replay crosses a configured threshold.
Planner/runtime update may consider the measurement without granting final claim credit.
Final readiness matrix may update only after all prior production gates pass.
Claim traceability links evidence, narrative, validation, figures, and limitations.
Claim credit may be granted only for real production_target evidence after all gates pass.
